reviews.author: Wyatt Rexer

reviews.author: Duc Duy Pham (Paul)
reviews.text: Delays in package pickup up to 3 days or in some cases more. Packages might get lost if delivered here. Staff are friendly and tries their bests to help, however issues continues to happen.

reviews.author: Karl Flanagan
reviews.text: Great location and reasonable price while my child was in camp for the week. Enjoyed the complimentary coffee/tea and hot chocolate. Spacious room and reception allowed us to store our bikes in our room. The only downside was the noisy bed and pullout couch. Otherwise I would recommend it.

reviews.author: Frank Lo

The rooms are spacious, well-maintained, and equipped with modern conveniences such

reviews.author: Breann
reviews.text: Stayed here a fee years ago for my birthday and it was perfect. The street was quiet and it was close to a lot of cool places. Checking in was easy and I felt safe. Bathroom and room were clean! Rules were understandable (regarding noise, etc) and didnt have any problems whatsoever! would recommend!

reviews.author: alsyna erika Depositar
reviews.text: Lived here for more than a year. Best thing here is the location, people are so friendly! We often have karaoke in the lounge and some activities initiated by the tenants. Theres also good set of amenities except the hot tub is always not working. Its just really so small like sometimes I would feel suffocated.

reviews.author: Imogen Grace

reviews.author: Bill Talbot
reviews.text: Beautiful historic true hard lofts in the heart of the city. Becoming increasingly more upscale as this cities crazy real estate market drives prices up. But still amazing value to be had compared to the many modern towers in the hood.

reviews.author: Rouvin Rebello

reviews.author: Natalie Hasulyo

reviews.author: Tatiana Bevilacqua

The building is well maintained and the units offer good space and amenities for a good price.

reviews.author: Stephanie E
reviews.text: I recently had the pleasure of exploring Mirvish Village, and I couldn’t be more impressed with the experience. reviews.author: Elijah Whitson
reviews.text: Great space! My partner and I have lived here for almost a year and we’ve had nothing but a wonderful experience. Tara, the resident manager has been amazing, reliable, and easy to reach out to for anything. They’ve got a great top floor lounge space, bike storage, and even a open space with garden plots!
